CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2014 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Richard Vanosten Jr.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Pursuant To Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar Sep-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Cary S. Kletter, Kletter Law Firm, 650.577.2336, appearing for the Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: Plaintiff Richard Vanosten Jr.'s Notice of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Pursuant To CCP 664.6 is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185. =(302/LCN)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-05-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Pursuant To Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar Aug-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. PLAINTIFF RICHARD VANOSTEN JR'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Pursuant To Ccp 664.6 IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR DESPITE A Hearing was required. The moving party failed to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party failed to e-mail a copy of the moving papers to contestdept302tr@sftc.org or at the hearing on August 16, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of This Court'S Order On Pltf'S Motion To Compel Further Responses
Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Duane J. Perry, Esq. of Perry & Julius, Tel. 415.986.7747, for defendant and moving party;
Cary Kletter, Esq. of Kletter Law Firm, Tel. 415.434.3400, for plaintiff and opposing party.

After hearing, the court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT ARCHIVES MANAGEMENT CORP.'s Motion For Reconsideration Of This Court's Order On Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Further Responses is granted.
